---
title: "ENVS 193DS Final"
author: Owen Wright
date: "June 9, 2026"
format:
  pdf:
    toc: true
editor: visual
---

GitHub repository: <https://github.com/owenwright-oss/ENVS-193DS_spring-2026_final>

# Set up

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false

#Load packages
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(janitor)
library(ggeffects)
library(DHARMa)
library(MuMIn)
library(gt)

#Read in data 
nests <- read_csv(here("data", "nest_data_final.csv"),
                        show_col_types = FALSE)

#Clean name 
nests <- clean_names(nests)

```
